series_metadata.series_description: These files contain examination reports for each savings and loan association regulated by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions under Chapters 1151., 1153., 1155., and 1157. of the Ohio Revised Code. These records also contain related examination report correspondence regarding directives issued by the Division.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for twenty (20) years after date of the examination report, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for twenty (20) years after date of the examination report, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
